name: canopy-browser
description: A macOS Chromium workspace with Spaces, Favorites, archives, routing, and private Canopy settings.

scripts.check: pnpm test && node scripts/validate-extension.mjs && node --check extension/core.js && node --check extension/background-v3.js && node --check extension/gestures.js && node --check extension/page-actions.js && node --check extension/sidepanel.js && node --check extension/newtab.js && bash -n scripts/download-chromium.sh scripts/run-canopy.sh scripts/build-mac-app.sh scripts/prepare-profile.sh
